title: statice gummifera var. cymulifera
intro: Statice gummifera var. cymulifera is a plant species that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae, commonly known as sea lavender or ice plant. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Statice gummifera var. cymulifera include wound healing, skin protection, and the treatment of various infections, such as respiratory and urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
